titleStmt.title: SII 36.100: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 100. (A.R. No. 100 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the first prākāra in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: The inscription is a copy of old inscriptions recording grants made during the period of Rājēndra I. The first inscription is about the grant made in the 15th year of Rājēndra I (A.D. 1027) to the goddess Umā Paramēśvari in the Mākāḷamuḍaiyār temple at Ambar for some services. The assembly of Madhurāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam assigned a tax free grant of land on receipt of 30 kaḻañcus of gold on behalf of Chaṇḍēśvara in the Mākāḷamuḍaiyār temple. The second inscription, also dated in the 15th year of Rājēndra I, records another tax-free grant of land to Umā Paramēśvari by the Nagaram of Ambar on receipt of eleven kaḻañcus of gold on behalf of Chaṇḍēśvara in the same temple. Ambar is said to be a brahmadēya in Ambar-nāḍu, which was a subdivision of Uyyakkoṇḍārvaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pūmātu puṇara puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu malara tantiruppatamalar maṉṉavar cūṭa manniya Urimaiyāl maṇimuṭi cūṭi ceṅkol cenṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali nīṅki meyyaṟan taḻaippa kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭaṟmalai naṭātti yiru cuṭaraḷavu valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭātti mukkokkiḻāṉaṭikaḷoṭum vīrasimhāsanattu vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāna tribhuvanac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikkiramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 ttāvatu § rājen=tacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5 kṣatrayaśikāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭup panayūr nāṭṭu tāṇṭa mūventa
veḷān Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Amparnāṭṭu Ampar Uṭaiyār tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār śrī kāmakkoṭṭattu Umāparameśvariyārai Eḻuntaruḷuvittu Amutupaṭikkum palapaṇi niman=takkāṟarkkum Ittevar tiripuvana śaṇṭeśvaratevakanmikku tirunāmattāl pala Ūrkaḷilum pon kuṭuttu Iṟaiyili cey ṇaṅkaḷ jīrṇṇittamaiyil tribhuvanac cakravattikaḷ śrī vikramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 vatu kalveṭṭinapaṭi Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu piramatecam maturāntakac caturvvetimaṅkalattu [sa]bhaiyom Uṭaiyār tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār tribhuvana caṇṭeśvara tevakanmikaḷ pakkal nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa pon muppatin kaḻañcu Ip poṉ muppatin kaḻañcuṅ koṇṭu ṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu tenpāṟkellai
nākapurattellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai tirumākāḷavatikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai karukāṭṭaṅkuṭikku teṟkum kīḻpāṟkellai meṟpaṭiyūrellaikku meṟkum Innānkellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nila mukkālum Iṅkē tirumākāḷavatikku meṟku nākapurattellaikku vaṭakkum mēlpāṟkellai kkum vaṭapāṟkellai mēṟpaṭiyūrellaikku teṟkum Innāṉkellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam kālum Ittevar taḷiccuṟṟu Uṭkiṭanta pirāmaṇakoṭi nilam Araiye kāṇiyum Āka nilam Onṟaraiye kāṇiyum Ittevar tirukkāmakoṭṭattu Umāparameśvariyāṟku Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom maturāntaka caturvvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom svastiśrī coḻadevaṟku patinañcāvatu Uyyak koṇ
ṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Ampar nakarattom tirukkāma koṭṭattu Umāparameśvariyār tripuvana śaṇṭeśvara devakanmikaḷ pakkal nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa pon patin(o)ṇ kaḻañcu Ip poṉ patineṇkaḻañcuṅ koṇṭu Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāna nāka cey lamāvatu tenpāṟkellai viṟkiṉṟom nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai tirumākāḷavatikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tirukkāmak koṭṭattukku maturāntakac caturvetimaṅkalattār Iṟaiyili viṟṟa nilattukku teṟkum kīḻpāṟkellai llaikkum vikkinṟo nilattukku meṟku tirumākāḷavatikku meṟku ttu kuṭpaṭṭa nilam
mūnṟu mākāṇiyum Āka nilam mukkāle mūnṟu mākāṇiyum Ittirukkāma koṭṭamuṭaiyār kanmikaḷ pakkal pon koṇṭu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom Ampar nakarattom
Digital edition of SII 36.100 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
